message:
test(conformal_alert): add 33 edge-case tests for NaN/Inf handling, alpha extremes, GRAPA lambda, trait coverage (bd-1uzxz)

Edge cases: NaN/Inf/neg-inf observations and calibration, alpha=1.0 and
alpha=1e-10, lambda clamped at 0 and 1, sigma_0=0, hysteresis=0,
max_calibration=0, min_calibration=0, cooldown=u64::MAX, adaptive lambda
GRAPA updates and boundedness, Welford variance with 0/1/known samples,
conformal score with empty calibration, interleaved calibrate/observe,
clear-then-recalibrate cycle, long-run e-value boundedness, alert counter
correctness, evidence.is_alert consistency, trait coverage (Clone/Debug)
for AlertConfig/AlertEvidence/AlertDecision/AlertStats/ConformalAlert.

Total: 62 tests (29 existing + 33 new). All quality gates pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
